content:
🎓 Empowering Young Minds Through Career Guidance

The right guidance at the right time can shape a brighter future.

Bharati Approaching Tomorrow Foundation (BATF) successfully conducted a Career Counselling & Guidance Session at Higher Secondary School, Ladma, Barh, Patna, helping students explore career opportunities aligned with their interests, abilities, and aspirations.

The session covered -
✅ Career planning and informed decision-making
✅ Higher education opportunities
✅ Competitive examinations
✅ Skill development for future careers
✅ Personality development and confidence building

At BATF, we believe that career counselling is not just about choosing a profession—it is about empowering young people with clarity, confidence, and the motivation to achieve their dreams.

Together, we are working towards a future where every student has access to quality guidance and equal opportunities to succeed.

BATF's Commitment - Quality guidance for every student. A better future for every youth.
